data.title: BitMine now holds 1.53M staked Ether, making up 4% of total. The total value surpasses $5B with recent addition of 186,560 Ether.
data.description: BitMine recently increased its Ether staking by an additional 186,560, totaling up to 1.53 million staked Ether. This brings the total value of the staked Ether to over $5 billion.

data.title: JPMorgan exec warns about stablecoin yields, calling them a risky alternative to traditional banks.
data.description: During an earnings call, Jeremy Barnum, the chief financial officer of JPMorgan, cautioned investors about stablecoin yields, describing them as risky and not recommended.

data.title: TCS & AMD partner to drive AI adoption at scale, aiming to modernize legacy environments and build secure digital workplaces.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) from Mumbai, India and AMD from Santa Clara, California, initiated a strategic partnership. TCS, a key player in IT services and consulting globally, disclosed plans to collaborate with AMD (NASDAQ: AMD). This alliance aims to assist businesses in enhancing AI integration from trial phases to full production, upgrading outdated systems, and establishing secure, high-speed digital workspaces. TCS is listed on BSE as 532540 and on NSE as TCS, while AMD is listed on NASDAQ as AMD.

data.title: Ipsen presents 14 data sets at TOXINS 2026 in Madrid, showcasing evidence in various neurological conditions like post-stroke spasticity and cervical dystonia.
data.description: In Paris, France on 14 January 2026, Ipsen (Euronext: IPN; ADR: IPSEY) revealed the unveiling of 14 studies at the TOXINS 2026 conference set in Madrid, Spain from 14-17 January. The data shared showcased substantial evidence covering various neurological conditions, particularly focusing on multiple movement disorders such as post-stroke spasticity, cervical dystonia, and blepharospasm. This contributes to the existing knowledge base on Dysport® (abobotulinumtoxinA) use in patient treatment. The company is also exploring new indications as part of their ongoing research efforts.

data.title: ScienceSoft to showcase multi-agent AI solution for contact centers at WHX Dubai 2026, including live demo on Feb 11.
data.description: In FUJAIRAH, UAE, ScienceSoft will be presenting AI-powered healthcare contact center solutions at WHX Dubai 2026 on February 11. The showcase will feature a live demonstration involving multiple agents.

data.title: 2026 Taiwan Foxconn Ladies Golf Tournament increases purse to record US$2 million, partners with JLPGA. Asia's top women's golf event.
data.description: The Taiwan Ladies Professional Golfers' Association (TLPGA) and Japan Ladies Professional Golfers' Association have excitingly revealed the upcoming "2026 Taiwan Foxconn Ladies Golf Tournament" scheduled for this year on the official JLPGA circuit. This event promises to be one of Asia's most financially rewarding women's golf tournaments.
